headline: EDISON INTERNATIONAL (NYSE:EIX) Passes Minervini's Trend Template and Growth Momentum Filters
summary: Edison International (EIX) exemplifies a growth momentum stock, meeting strict technical uptrend criteria and showing strong fundamental earnings and sales acceleration.
